notes: Selection methodology: stratified greedy bucket-fill across three diversity dimensions (change_shape, files_bucket, size_bucket). Hard-rejects: docs-only, test-only, generated_or_config, empty/trivial diffs. Tiebreaker for equal-score candidates: prefer larger pr_number (more recent). Deterministic: same FLT repo state + same flags yields byte-identical output. This is T4-C-prep — selection is curated, NOT yet graded. Each selected PR must pass curator hand-grading before its expected.json transitions from PENDING_HUMAN_GRADING to GRADED_PASS_1 and joins the scored corpus.
